MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,155.67 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC AS TO DEFENDANT FRED PAVLOW CO. INC DBA ADD-A-GARAGE (AGENT: FRED- - PAVLOW) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
